parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var ICON_ID = 'gtm-footer-mouse-icon-10px';
  var ICON_SRC = 'data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 32 32"%3E%3Ccircle cx="12" cy="11" r="5" fill="%23999999"/%3E%3Ccircle cx="20" cy="11" r="5" fill="%23999999"/%3E%3Cellipse cx="16" cy="18" rx="10" ry="8" fill="%23888888"/%3E%3Ccircle cx="13" cy="17" r="1.2" fill="%23111111"/%3E%3Ccircle cx="19" cy="17" r="1.2" fill="%23111111"/%3E%3Ccircle cx="16" cy="20" r="1.3" fill="%23ff6b81"/%3E%3Cpath d="M25 21c3 0 5 2 5 4" fill="none" stroke="%23777777" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/%3E%3C/svg%3E';

  function findFooter() {
    return document.querySelector('footer, .footer, #footer, [role="contentinfo"]');
  }

  function appendIcon() {
    if (document.getElementById(ICON_ID)) return true;

    var footer = findFooter();
    if (!footer) return false;

    var icon = document.createElement('img');
    icon.id = ICON_ID;
    icon.src = ICON_SRC;
    icon.alt = 'mouse icon';
    icon.width = 10;
    icon.height = 10;
    icon.style.width = '10px';
    icon.style.height = '10px';
    icon.style.marginLeft = '6px';
    icon.style.verticalAlign = 'middle';
    icon.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

    footer.appendChild(icon);
    return true;
  }

  if (appendIcon()) return;

  var tries = 0;
  var timer = setInterval(function () {
    tries += 1;
    if (appendIcon() || tries >= 20) clearInterval(timer);
  }, 500);
})();
</script>

trigger.name: PV - All Pages - Footer Mouse Icon
